name: Qualitas Limited
analysis: QAL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.9900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.0800, stop A$2.5344, target A$3.4008 (0.59:1) — then trail it.
